description_long: This jet ski features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly gray and black color scheme accented by white and subtle orange highlights. The body is wide and flat, with two large, hexagonal side pontoons connected to a central cockpit area that appears enclosed with a transparent canopy. The rear section includes visible propulsion units, likely jet thrusters, and the front has a streamlined, armored appearance. The surface is mostly smooth with some matte and glossy sections, and the structure suggests a robust, composite build. The handlebar area is integrated into the cockpit, with no exposed grips, and the seating area is contoured for a single rider. Overall, the design is sleek and modern, suitable for high-speed water travel in urban environments.
description: A sleek, angular jet ski with a wide, futuristic body, gray and black color scheme, and a central cockpit with integrated controls.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wide, flat body, hexagonal pontoons, and the central cockpit with a low profile.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the symmetrical layout, cockpit canopy, and the full extent of the angular pontoons.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the propulsion units and side details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the armored nose, cockpit canopy, and the dual rear propulsion units.
attribute_handlebar_design: Integrated into the cockpit, low-profile, angular structure with no visible grips or external controls, matching the body color scheme.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single contoured seat, centrally positioned, with a smooth surface and slight elevation at the rear for back support, finished in gray and black.
